name: Hot Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan.
2. Add the garlic and gingerroot and cook briefly.
3. Add the onion and cook until soft.
4. Add the tomatoes and puree, breaking up the tomatoes with a wooden spoon.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Add the sambal and soy sauce and simmer for another 15 minutes.
7. Pass the sauce through the coarse blade of a food mill into a clean bowl.
8. Allow to cool until needed.
9. To serve, reheat and adjust seasonings to taste.
10. Makes 2 3/4 cups. For a milder sauce, reduce the sambal. May be stored for brief periods if refrigerated. Serve with Cabbage Rolls, Spaghetti, Steamed Fish.
